General.Name: Caisse Reg Cred Agric Mut Tourain Poitou
General.Description: Caisse Régionale de Crédit Agricole Mutuel de La Touraine et du Poitou Société Coopérative provides various banking products and services in France. It offers savings and investment solutions, including solidarity savings and socially responsible investment, real estate investment, stock market and financial investment, retirement saving solutions, and term plans; bank accounts and payment management; bank cards; news and magazines; and e-documents. The company also provides real estate loans, and consumer and revolving credit; life insurance, property, and casualty insurance, such as home, car and 2-wheeler, health and welfare, leisure and daily life, and borrower; and leasing and factoring services, as well as engages in the consulting and fundraising activities. It serves individuals, professionals, businesses, entrepreneurs, farmers, associations, and local authorities. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Poitiers, France. Caisse Régionale de Crédit Agricole Mutuel de la Touraine et du Poitou Société Coopérative operates as a subsidiary of Crédit Agricole S.A.
